decision.rationale: A bounded recovery probe confirmed SEC EDGAR submissions metadata reachability, Form 4 acceptance timestamps, and parseable raw ownership XML in a small sample. However, no durable 2018-2026 timestamp-safe parsed event table with at least 500 conservatively mapped clustered insider-imbalance events was built, and no mapping, clustering, concentration, control, or performance gates were completed.

data.source: SEC EDGAR submissions metadata and raw Form 4 ownership XML

bounded_probe.path_resolution_note: When primaryDocument used an XSL path such as xslF345X06/form4.xml, raw XML was resolved by using the accession directory basename form4.xml rather than the XSL subdirectory URL.

candidate_pool.description: Potentially SEC Form 4 and Form 4/A ownership filings for liquid U.S. common-stock issuers over 2018-2026, if parsed from raw XML with EDGAR acceptance timestamps and conservative issuer mapping.

failed_components: no durable 2018-2026 Form 4 parsed event table was built
conservative issuer-to-liquid-common-stock mapping was not built
duplicate and amendment handling was not built
issuer/date/filer transaction clustering and sale-to-purchase imbalance calculation were not built
breadth and concentration gates were not evaluated
real-data performance evaluator and controls were not run
source_gate.reason: The issue requires a reproducible timestamp-safe Form 4 event table with at least 500 mapped clustered events before any alpha claim. The bounded recovery proved source/parsing basics only.

performance_run.reason: Source/event-table gate failed; no returns, event windows, controls, costs, random periods, shifted/shuffled labels, daemon, or orders were evaluated.

limitations: The probe was intentionally bounded to 5 CIKs and 10 sampled Form 4 filings, below the allowed cap of 10 CIKs and 30 filings.
No raw SEC filings, raw event rows, raw parsed table, or market bars were retained.
SEC company ticker/common-stock mapping, survivorship handling, ticker changes, amendments, duplicate filings, filer roles, and clustered imbalance breadth remain unresolved.
Observed transaction code counts are source parsing observations only, not alpha or performance metrics.
status_rationale: Rejected for this research cycle at source/event-table gate with a disabled zero-weight model. No direct Form 4 continuation child should be created.
